title: Analysis of RNA polymerase II phosphorylation in STimulated Emission Double Depletion (STEDD) microscopy images
author: Lennart Hilbert
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This data set includes the raw image data and MatLab analysis scripts to assess the relative distribution of RNA polymerase II C-terminal domain serine 5 and serine 2 phosphorylation in zebrafish embryos. Phosphorylated polymerase II was labeled by immunofluorescence, microscopy images were acquired by STEDD microscopy and analyzed using MatLab scripts. Images were recorded in the laboratory of Uli Nienhaus at Karlsruhe Institute of Technology.
